name: Active Position Monitor
description: Every 30 min (9:30AM-4PM ET, Mon-Fri): Monitors open short-term positions against their stop-loss and take-profit levels. Creates urgent alerts when stops are hit or targets reached. Tracks trailing stops for profitable positions.

parameters.content:
## Active Position Monitor

Required: postgresApi, httpHeaderAuth (FMP)
Monitors stop-loss and take-profit levels
Every 30 min during market hours

parameters.query: SELECT s.ticker, s.thesis, s.created_at, a.metadata FROM investment_scores s LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT metadata FROM alerts WHERE ticker = s.ticker AND strategy = 'short_term' AND alert_type LIKE 'trade_setup_%' ORDER BY triggered_at DESC LIMIT 1) a ON true WHERE s.strategy = 'short_term' AND s.recommendation IN ('ENTER', 'WATCH') AND s.score_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days'

INSERT INTO alerts (ticker, alert_type, strategy, message, severity, metadata) VALUES ('{{$json.ticker}}', '{{$json.alert_type}}', 'short_term', '{{$json.message}}', '{{$json.severity}}', '{"price": {{$json.price}}, "level": {{$json.level}}}');
